taxonomy.title: Story
taxonomy.definition: The meaningful progression of events that changes the audience's understanding, emotion, or perspective.

taxonomy.title: Curiosity
taxonomy.definition: The desire to continue because meaningful information has not yet been fully revealed.

taxonomy.title: Momentum
taxonomy.definition: The perception that the story is continuously progressing, regardless of editing speed.

taxonomy.title: Emotional Density
taxonomy.definition: The amount of meaningful emotional information contained within a moment.

taxonomy.title: Visual Economy
taxonomy.definition: The degree to which every visual element contributes to the story.

taxonomy.title: Authenticity
taxonomy.definition: The extent to which the audience believes the experience is genuine.

taxonomy.title: Payoff
taxonomy.definition: The satisfying resolution of a promise previously made to the audience.

tools.title: Shot Value Matrix
tools.summary: Ranks footage by story, emotion, visual quality, brand value, and uniqueness.

tools.title: Cut Decision Matrix
tools.summary: Determines whether a shot earns its place in the edit.

tools.title: Gap Analyzer
tools.summary: Identifies missing story, context, reactions, coverage, and endings.

tools.title: Client Translator
tools.summary: Converts vague client feedback into diagnosable creative variables.

tools.title: Creative GPS
tools.summary: Routes a creative problem to the right tools, trees, rubrics, and case studies.

playbooks.title: Restaurant Brand Documentary
playbooks.summary: Build emotional connection through people, history, craft, and community.

playbooks.title: Signature Dish Reel
playbooks.summary: Make one dish feel irresistible using reveal, texture, sound, and payoff.

playbooks.title: Employee Comedy Reel
playbooks.summary: Create authentic brand-safe humor rooted in real workplace character.

playbooks.title: Event Highlight Film
playbooks.summary: Make viewers who were absent wish they had attended.

nodes.result: Use Story Discovery and Gap Analyzer to establish progression.

nodes.question: Does the emotion change over time?

nodes.result: Map the emotional arc and add contrast or a stronger character moment.

nodes.question: Does visual or narrative novelty refresh attention?

nodes.result: Use Redundancy Detector and Shot Replacement Engine.

nodes.question: Is there a reason to continue watching?

nodes.result: Create an unanswered question, delayed reveal, or visible progression.

nodes.question: Is the information delivered at the right rate?

nodes.result: Use Pacing Calculator and reduce repeated information.
Run the Retention Rubric and First-Time Viewer review.

criteria.name: Visual Intent
criteria.anchor10: Every major visual choice supports meaning
